zh.lifeSummary: Mawd Gwenllian verch Cadwallon - Cydwallon是Cadwallon ap Madog和Gwladus ferch Philip的女兒，於1240年出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾馬利德。她於0950年之前與Meredith Ap Griffith在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1330年在威爾士享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mawd Gwenllian verch Cadwallon - Cydwallon是Cadwallon ap Madog和Gwladus ferch Philip的女儿，于1240年出生在威尔士拉德諾斯爾馬利德。她于0950年之前与Meredith Ap Griffith在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1330年在威尔士享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mawd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Mawd Gwenllian verch Cadwallon - Cydwallon was born in 1240, in Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Wales as the daughter of Cadwallon ap Madog and Gwladus ferch Philip. She married Meredith Ap Griffith before 0950, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1330, in Wales, at the age of 90.

fr.Rhisga, Monmouthshire, England: Risca, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Mawd Gwenllian verch Cadwallon - Cydwallon est née en 1240, à Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Galles, fille de Cadwallon ap Madog et Gwladus ferch Philip. Elle a épousé Meredith Ap Griffith avant 0950, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1330, à Galles, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mawd Gwenllian verch Cadwallon - Cydwallon wurde 1240 in Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Wales, als Tochter von Cadwallon ap Madog und Gwladus ferch Philip geboren. Sie hat vor 0950 in Wales, United Kingdom Meredith Ap Griffith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1330 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Wales.

Lei sposato Meredith Ap Griffith prima del 0950, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1330, nel Galles, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mawd Gwenllian verch Cadwallon - Cydwallonは1240年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアメイリーニーッドでCadwallon ap MadogとGwladus ferch Philipの娘として生まれた。0950年以前にイギリスウェールズでMeredith Ap Griffithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1330年にウェールズで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mawd Gwenllian verch Cadwallon - Cydwallon(은)는 1240년 웨일스 라드노르실르 메이리니드에서 Cadwallon ap Madog(와)과 Gwladus ferch Philip의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 0950년 이전 영국 웨일스에서 Meredith Ap Griffith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 웨일스에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mawd Gwenllian verch Cadwallon - Cydwallon родилась в 1240 г. в местности мэелиенидд, радноршир, Уэльс. Её родителей звали Cadwallon ap Madog и Gwladus ferch Philip. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Meredith Ap Griffith перед 0950 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1330 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mawd Gwenllian verch Cadwallon - Cydwallon nació en 1240, en Maelienydd, Radnorshire, Gales como hija de Cadwallon ap Madog y Gwladus ferch Philip. Se casó con Meredith Ap Griffith antes de 0950, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1330, en Gales, a la edad de 90 años.
